works.title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners
works.summary: Shows that multitask instruction tuning can significantly improve zero-shot generalization in language models, establishing a representative modern SFT paradigm.
works.whyMilestone: It clearly demonstrates how high-quality instruction data and mixed-task recipes can turn a base model into a general-purpose task executor, making it a key milestone in SFT becoming a mainstream post-training step.

works.title: Self-Instruct: Aligning Language Models with Self-Generated Instructions
works.summary: Proposes expanding SFT datasets with model-generated instruction data, lowering the dependence on large amounts of manual annotation.
works.whyMilestone: It moved SFT from fully human-curated data toward scalable pipelines, opening the path to synthetic data generation and instruction-recipe engineering.

works.title: Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning
works.summary: Introduces DQN and effectively combines deep learning with reinforcement learning, showing that complex policies can be learned directly from pixels.
works.whyMilestone: This marks the beginning of deep reinforcement learning and provides core methodology for later uses of RL in more complex sequential decision making and model post-training.

works.title: Proximal Policy Optimization Algorithms
works.summary: Introduces PPO, a stable and easy-to-implement policy optimization method that became one of the most common algorithms in RL and RLHF practice.
works.whyMilestone: Whether in classical RL or early RLHF, PPO is a highly influential engineering method that connects theoretical usability with large-scale training practice.

works.title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback
works.summary: Systematically presents the full alignment pipeline of using human preference data, reward models, and RL optimization to improve model alignment.
works.whyMilestone: This work turned preference alignment from a collection of isolated tricks into a complete and reproducible pipeline, becoming one of the starting points for later RLHF, reward modeling, and post-training alignment research.

works.title: Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model
works.summary: Introduces DPO, which optimizes preference pairs directly without explicitly training a reward model, simplifying the alignment pipeline.
works.whyMilestone: DPO represents the shift from complex RL pipelines toward more direct and reproducible preference optimization objectives, marking an important advance in both alignment theory and engineering.

works.title: Tree of Thoughts: Deliberate Problem Solving with Large Language Models
works.summary: Brings tree search into LLM reasoning, allowing models to branch, evaluate, and backtrack across multiple intermediate thoughts.
works.whyMilestone: It makes clear that complex reasoning is not just longer chain-of-thought, but also a problem of search-space management and compute allocation.

works.title: A general reinforcement learning algorithm that masters chess, shogi, and Go through self-play
works.summary: Combines self-play and search to show how policy networks, value networks, and tree search can work together for powerful decision making.
works.whyMilestone: AlphaZero proves that combining search with learning can create strong reasoning in complex discrete spaces, heavily influencing later reasoning-plus-search directions.

works.title: AlphaGeometry: An Olympiad-level AI system for geometry
works.summary: Combines neural models with symbolic engines to achieve high-level performance on Olympiad-style geometry problems.
works.whyMilestone: It is one of the most representative AI4Math systems and shows that neuro-symbolic combinations can deliver practical capability on difficult math tasks.

works.title: AI achieves silver-medal standard solving International Mathematical Olympiad problems
works.summary: AlphaProof and AlphaGeometry 2 jointly solve IMO problems at silver-medal level, advancing systems for difficult mathematical problem solving.
works.whyMilestone: It shows that AI4Math has moved from isolated subtasks to full competition-problem solving, making it an important outward-facing result of logical-mathematical intelligence.

works.title: Highly accurate protein structure prediction with AlphaFold
works.summary: Achieves near-experimental accuracy in protein structure prediction and demonstrates AI breakthroughs on core scientific problems.
works.whyMilestone: AlphaFold is one of the landmark milestones in AI4Science, proving that AI can have decisive impact on long-standing scientific challenges.

works.title: Learning skillful medium-range global weather forecasting
works.summary: Uses graph neural networks for medium-range global weather forecasting and surpasses traditional numerical baselines on multiple metrics.
works.whyMilestone: It shows that AI4Science is not only about analyzing existing data, but also about providing more efficient and more accurate paradigms for high-value scientific forecasting tasks.

works.title: Generative language modeling for automated theorem proving
works.summary: Uses generative language models to search for proofs in the Metamath formal system, showing the potential of language models in theorem proving.
works.whyMilestone: This is an important early work connecting large-model capability to formal proof workflows and pointing the way toward later automated theorem proving systems.

works.title: LeanDojo: Theorem Proving with Retrieval-Augmented Language Models
works.summary: Provides a Lean environment, retrieval-augmented proving methods, and reproducible baselines that advance systematic research on automated theorem proving.
works.whyMilestone: LeanDojo connects environment, data, and models into a unified framework, forming an important foundation for moving automated theorem proving from isolated demos to system applications.

works.title: Discovering faster matrix multiplication algorithms with reinforcement learning
works.summary: Uses reinforcement learning to discover better matrix multiplication algorithms and improves known results on multiple tensor multiplication problems.
works.whyMilestone: It clearly shows that models can enter discrete algorithm spaces for real discovery instead of staying at the level of natural-language assistance.

works.title: Discovering faster sorting algorithms using deep reinforcement learning
works.summary: Finds improved implementations for low-level sorting and hashing algorithms, directly affecting real software-library performance.
works.whyMilestone: It pushes algorithm discovery from mathematical construction into systems software optimization, demonstrating the practical value of logical-mathematical intelligence at the program and infrastructure level.

works.title: Efficient Memory Management for Large Language Model Serving with PagedAttention
works.summary: Introduces PagedAttention to improve memory efficiency and throughput for online large-model inference.
works.whyMilestone: This paper establishes the core technical foundation of the vLLM direction and stands as a representative result in modern large-model serving infrastructure.

works.title: vLLM
works.summary: An open-source engine for high-throughput LLM inference and API serving that has become key infrastructure for open-model deployment.
works.whyMilestone: vLLM turns systems optimizations from research into a widely used engineering product and marks a key milestone in the open AI infrastructure ecosystem.

works.title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism
works.summary: Proposes model-parallel training schemes for ultra-large models and pushes standardization in large-scale training infrastructure.
works.whyMilestone: Megatron-LM is a representative work in modern AI infrastructure and lays foundational practice for partitioning and scaling distributed LLM training.

works.title: DeepSpeed: System Optimizations Enable Training Deep Learning Models with Over 100 Billion Parameters
works.summary: Greatly reduces memory and communication cost in large-model training through system optimizations such as ZeRO, becoming a core infrastructure toolchain.
works.whyMilestone: DeepSpeed represents the mainstream path of joint optimization across algorithms and systems in AI infrastructure, with deep impact on training cost and scalability.

works.title: UltraFeedback: Boosting Language Models with High-quality Feedback
works.summary: Builds a large-scale, high-quality feedback dataset for post-training and preference optimization across multi-stage alignment workflows.
works.whyMilestone: Because post-training pipelines are often bottlenecked by data rather than compute, UltraFeedback represents an important direction in engineering and standardizing preference data.

works.title: OpenInstruct
works.summary: Provides an open post-training workflow from SFT to preference optimization, along with experiment scripts for building reproducible instruction-tuned models.
works.whyMilestone: It turns post-training from a paper method into an executable, scalable, and comparable engineering pipeline, making it an important representative of post-training infrastructure.

works.title: Holistic Evaluation of Language Models
works.summary: Proposes a unified framework for evaluating language models across dimensions such as accuracy, calibration, robustness, and fairness.
works.whyMilestone: HELM shifts model evaluation away from a single score toward a full system profile, making it a representative benchmark-infrastructure mindset.

works.title: Measuring Mathematical Problem Solving With the MATH Dataset
works.summary: Builds a challenging mathematics benchmark for evaluating models on step-by-step reasoning and complex problem solving.
works.whyMilestone: MATH is one of the most representative benchmarks for logical-mathematical capability, moving math reasoning from anecdotal demos to comparable experimental settings.

works.title: Attention Is All You Need
works.summary: Introduces the Transformer architecture and replaces RNNs with self-attention for sequence modeling.
works.whyMilestone: One of the most important milestones in modern deep learning, it became the foundational architecture for LLMs and many NLP systems.

works.title: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
works.summary: Shows the powerful few-shot and zero-shot capabilities of GPT-3 with 175 billion parameters.
works.whyMilestone: It demonstrated that scaled language models have remarkable few-shot learning ability and helped launch the LLM era.

works.title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition
works.summary: Applies a pure Transformer architecture to image classification in the form of Vision Transformer (ViT).
works.whyMilestone: It challenged CNN dominance in computer vision and demonstrated the cross-domain generality of Transformers.

works.title: Masked Autoencoders Are Scalable Vision Learners
works.summary: Introduces masked autoencoders (MAE) for visual representation learning and substantially improves ViT training efficiency.
works.whyMilestone: It shows the effectiveness of masked learning in vision and offers a new paradigm for large-scale visual model training.

works.title: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
works.summary: Introduces denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPM) for generating high-quality images through progressive denoising.
works.whyMilestone: It revitalized diffusion-model research and became one of the mainstream technologies in modern generative AI.

works.title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models
works.summary: Performs diffusion modeling in latent space, greatly improving generation efficiency and image quality.
works.whyMilestone: It brought high-quality AI image generation to a broad audience and accelerated the explosive growth of AIGC.

works.title: Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning
works.summary: Introduces Deep Q-Network (DQN) and reaches human-level performance on Atari games.
works.whyMilestone: A foundational work in deep reinforcement learning that showed the huge potential of combining deep learning with RL.

works.title: Highly accurate protein structure prediction with AlphaFold
works.summary: Solves the 50-year protein folding problem with near-experimental prediction accuracy.
works.whyMilestone: A milestone for AI for Science that demonstrates AI's huge potential in solving complex scientific problems.

works.title: Tacotron: Towards End-to-End Speech Synthesis
works.summary: Introduces the Tacotron end-to-end speech synthesis architecture, generating speech waveforms directly from text.
works.whyMilestone: It opened a new paradigm for end-to-end speech synthesis and greatly improved the naturalness of generated speech.

works.title: Conditional Variational Autoencoder with Adversarial Learning for End-to-End Text-to-Speech
works.summary: Combines VAE and adversarial learning in an end-to-end TTS system to improve speech expressiveness.
works.whyMilestone: It improved speech quality and expressiveness, helping advance high-quality TTS systems.

works.title: Mastering the game of Go with deep neural networks and tree search
works.summary: AlphaGo defeated a world champion in Go, one of the most complex board games.
works.whyMilestone: A landmark in AI history that demonstrated breakthroughs from deep learning in complex decision-making problems.

works.title: Dota 2 with Large Scale Deep Reinforcement Learning
works.summary: OpenAI Five defeated world-class teams in the complex multi-agent game Dota 2.
works.whyMilestone: It demonstrated the potential of collaborative multi-agent learning and pushed RL research in complex environments.

works.title: Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning for Fast Adaptation of Deep Networks
works.summary: Introduces MAML, enabling models to adapt quickly to new tasks.
works.whyMilestone: A classic work in meta-learning that provides a general solution for few-shot learning.

works.title: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
works.summary: Shows the intrinsic meta-learning ability of large-scale language models.
works.whyMilestone: It reveals the relationship between model scale and meta-learning ability, laying theoretical groundwork for few-shot learning in large models.
